title: Indulgent Norwegian Lamb Pilaf
description: A rich and savory lamb pilaf, flavored with pickled mustard greens and served in an earthenware bowl.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb mince and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through.
Stir in the pickled mustard greens, caraway seeds, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Add the white rice and stir to combine.
Add 400ml of hot water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let sit for 5 minutes before serving.
To make the pasta-water emulsion, blend 100g of cooked white rice with 100ml of hot water in a blender until smooth.
Serve the lamb pilaf in an earthenware bowl, topped with a drizzle of pasta-water emulsion.
